page_title: Tamashii no Rufuran/Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore (single)
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KIDA-146, it was released on 21 February 1997. https://vgmdb.net/album/22351 This single contains the theme and image song for the Evangelion: Death and Rebirth theatrical film.

Tracklist

Staff

Track-01
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi

Track-02
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi
